mouth_pose: lips rounded into a tight forward-pushed pucker like whistling or blowing out a candle, a small round lip opening at the center, no teeth showing and no tongue visible, classic /ʃ/ lip-protrusion shape
sound_gesture: one paw raised near the cheek as a shushing gesture but not touching the mouth, other paw on hip, one eye winking
word_decor: paper sailor hat shaped like a small ship
curved seashell headpieces jutting from the head like horns

voice.character_description: young mischievous whispery boy, softly spoken with playful cadence, subtle wind-like breath

clips.greet: Shhh! You made it. Can you hear my sound?
clips.friday_acknowledge: You found my sound. Now I am yours to remember.
